chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1444 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5650/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 07-10-2025 M/s Israr Ahmed Shah and Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Malano, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza Shah, District Education Officer (ES& HS) Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioners submits that Petitioners No.1, 3, 4, 5, 7, 10 and 12 namely Jazib Akhtar, Abdul Rehman, Daniyal Shaikh, Sadam Hussain, Muhammad Jareer, Sooda Ahsan and Anum, have already approached the committee constituted by the Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, while the remaining Petitioners will also approach the said Committee before its meeting which is scheduled on 08-10-2025. He further submits that he would be satisfied and will not press this petition, if the remaining petitioners may be allowed to approach the said Committee by filing their Representations and their cases will be heard and decided in the meeting scheduled to be held on 08-10-2025 in accordance with the law. The proposal so made by Counsel for the petitioners has not been opposed by learned Additional AG. Under the circumstances, the petition is disposed of along with pending application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
